Bold primary: Classic toy-box energy with bright red, electric blue, sunny yellow, and clean white — pure LEGO joy.
80s saturated: Radical retro vibes with hot pink, teal, lemon yellow, and glossy black — neon toy catalog nostalgia.
Pastel cozy: Gentle playroom warmth with soft pink, mint green, butter yellow, and cream — nursery sweetness.
Noir moody: Shadowy toy detective drama with deep charcoal, single amber spotlight, slate grey, and cream accents.
Fantasy warm: Enchanted storybook glow with rich amber, shimmering gold, deep forest green, and parchment cream.
Sci-fi cool: Futuristic robot sleekness with polished chrome, bright cyan, sterile white, and inky shadow depths.
Sackboy burlap: Handcrafted textile charm with natural brown, sandy beige, soft green yarn, and cream stitching.
Claymation primary: Squishy Play-Doh brightness with vivid red, sky blue, sunshine yellow, and grass green — moldable magic.
Vinyl glossy: Designer collectible sheen with glossy rich magenta, jet black matte panels, and dramatic shadow contrast.
Cyberpunk neon: Electric dystopian buzz with screaming magenta, digital cyan, acid yellow, and pitch black — future arcade.
Rust and brass steampunk: Victorian clockwork charm with oxidized bronze, burnt rust, aged cream, and deep mechanical shadow.
Pirate cove: Treasure island adventure with deep teal waters, doubloon gold, weathered brown wood, and sailcloth cream.
Ninja stealth: Silent warrior minimalism with midnight black, blood red accents, stone grey, and ceremonial gold highlights.
Wild-west sepia: Frontier toy nostalgia with burnt orange dust, sandy tan, gunslinger black, and faded cream canvas.
Castle medieval: Stone fortress majesty with slate grey walls, burgundy banners, heraldic gold, and moss green tapestries.
Space-marine: Military sci-fi grit with olive armor, desert khaki, gunmetal grey, and amber targeting lights.
Autumn-toy: Fall harvest warmth with rusty orange, pumpkin spice, honey amber, and rich chocolate brown.
Winter-snow-toy: Frosty playtime stillness with pure white drifts, pale ice blue, cool grey, and glowing amber windows.
Jungle-green: Tropical adventure density with saturated emerald greens, earth brown, and dappled sunlight gold.
Ocean-blue: Deep sea exploration wonder with cobalt depths, teal waves, white foam crests, and bright coral accents.
Desert-dune: Sun-baked expedition warmth with golden sand, terracotta clay, weathered cream, and long shadow indigo.
Lego-classic: Timeless brick-building joy with fire-engine red, cobalt blue, canary yellow, lime green, stark white, coal black.
Coraline-eerie: Uncanny button-eyed atmosphere with muted teal doors, burnt rust keys, ashen charcoal, ghost white porcelain.
Laika-autumn: Stop-motion harvest richness with deep pumpkin orange, wine burgundy, shadowy forest, and weathered cream fabric.
70s toy-catalog: Vintage playtime nostalgia with avocado green appliances, amber plastic, faded cream, sun-bleached brick red.
Superhero bright: Comic-book action punch with primary cape red, hero blue, lightning yellow, and bold white highlights.
Fairy-tale pastel: Storybook dreamland softness with lavender twilight, ballet-slipper rose, whisper mint, and cream clouds.
Mid-century-modern-toy: Retro-atomic playroom style with robin's-egg teal, mustard accent, cream walls, and walnut wood grain.
Christmas-toy: Holiday morning magic with crimson ribbons, evergreen branches, shimmering gold foil, and frosted cream snow.
Retro-robot: Tin-toy mechanical wonder with polished chrome body, candy-apple red, sky blue circuits, and lemon yellow caution.
Carnival bright: Big-top spectacle with striped crimson, popcorn yellow, circus tent white, and confetti blue streamers.
Midnight galaxy: Cosmic toy wonder with deep navy, silver starlight, violet nebula, and gleaming white planets.
Tropical punch: Island playset energy with flamingo pink, lime green, mango orange, and coconut white accents.
Gothic castle: Dark fairy-tale mystery with plum purple, shadow black, pewter grey, and candlelight ivory.
Sunrise meadow: Morning toy adventure with peach dawn, buttercup yellow, grass green, and wispy cloud white.
Bubblegum pop: Candy-coated sweetness with hot pink spheres, baby blue, lavender swirl, and sugar white sparkles.
Monster laboratory: Mad scientist chaos with toxic green slime, electric purple, laboratory white, and shadow charcoal.
Safari expedition: Wild plains exploration with khaki tan, lion amber, acacia green, and bone white.
Arcade cabinet: Quarter-fed nostalgia with joystick red, button blue, coin-slot yellow, and cabinet black.
Railway vintage: Conductor's heritage with locomotive burgundy, coal smoke grey, brass detail, and ticket cream.
Candy shop: Sugary confection heaven with peppermint red stripes, bubblegum pink, lemon drop yellow, marshmallow white swirls.
Submarine depths: Undersea vessel adventure with navy hull, periscope brass, porthole teal, and pressure gauge cream.
Volcano island: Molten tropical drama with lava orange, ash grey, jungle emerald, and obsidian black rock.
Ice cream parlor: Frozen dessert delight with strawberry pink, mint chip green, vanilla cream, chocolate brown swirl.
Racing stripes: Speed demon energy with checkered flag black, racing white, champion gold, podium red accents.
Moonbase alpha: Lunar outpost isolation with crater grey, rocket white, antenna silver, and Earth-glow blue.
Bakery morning: Fresh-baked comfort with croissant golden, flour white, apron cream, and cinnamon brown warmth.
Thunder storm: Dramatic weather toy with storm cloud charcoal, lightning white, rain slate, and warning yellow.
Dragon hoard: Mythical treasure trove with emerald scales, ruby gem, ancient gold coins, and cavern shadow.
Lighthouse beacon: Coastal guardian watch with maritime white tower, warning red stripe, ocean teal, brass lantern.
